procedural_deviation_disclosure: A separate pilot was not conducted before registered scoring. The first 10 critiques of the human validation subset (by selection index) were retrospectively designated as the pilot subset and used to derive equivalence bounds per Section 6.6 procedure; the remaining 40 critiques served as the validation test subset. This deviation from the filed procedure (which envisioned a separate pre-registered-run pilot) is disclosed transparently and does not alter the pre-registered statistical procedure (TOST for Δμ, Levene's for Δσ) or the four-cell decision surface.

derived_bounds.delta_mu_rationale: pilot paired-difference SD = 0 (degenerate); fallback to 0.5 on 0-5 composite scale, anchored to small-effect interpretation
derived_bounds.delta_sigma_rationale: Standard symmetric ratio bound [0.5, 2.0]; not pilot-derivable when pilot SDs are degenerate. Documented as pre-set.
